Question: Match the term with its definition or example
Answer:
1) Magnet - a) Object that attracts magnetic materials
2) Magnetic pole - b) End of a magnet where force is strongest
3) North pole - c) Pole of a magnet that points toward geographic north
4) South pole - d) Pole of a magnet that points toward geographic south
5) Temporary magnet - e) Material that behaves like a magnet only for a short time
6) Permanent magnet - f) Magnet that retains its magnetism
7) Electromagnet - g) Magnet created by electric current
8) Magnetic field - h) Region around a magnet where magnetic forces act
9) Attraction - i) Force by which unlike poles pull each other
10) Repulsion - j) Force by which like poles push each other
11) Ferromagnetic material - k) Materials strongly attracted by magnets (iron, nickel, cobalt)
12) Domains - l) Groups of aligned atoms in a magnetic material
13) Lodestone - m) Naturally occurring magnet
14) Compass - n) Device that shows direction using magnet
15) Magnetic induction - o) Process of magnetizing a material by placing it near a magnet
